title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 301.684 - Transfers not subject to sales and use tax
text:
301.684.  Transfers not subject to sales and use tax. — Transfers authorized by sections 301.675 to 301.682 and sections 306.455 to 306.465 shall not be subject to any tax imposed under the provisions of chapter 144.
(L. 1987 H.B. 605 § 12)
